## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss unusual opportunities (ops) in HubSpot, focusing on Ramp and Airbyte accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramp account has two separate line items: a completed 6-month project ($18K) and an ongoing 3-month renewal ($9K)](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Airbyte account evolved from $12K/month to $30K/month after a strategy sprint, requiring proper representation in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Both accounts need cleanup in HubSpot to accurately reflect contract changes and financial history](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Topics

### Ramp Account Cleanup

  - [Original agreement: $18K for 6 months (Aug-Feb), now completed](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Ongoing agreement: $9K renewing every 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Decision: Separate the completed project into its own op](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Action: Adjust current op to reflect only the ongoing $9K/3-month agreement](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Next steps: Kyle to review and generate proper renewal after changes](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Airbyte Account Evolution

  - [Original contract: $12K/month for 12 months (March-August)](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [One-off strategy sprint in June: $30K](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Upsell: Increased to $30K/month starting August](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Challenge: Representing the contract evolution in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Potential solution: End original deal, start new growth execution deal at higher rate](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Need to show financial history (e.g., April at $12K, August at $30K)](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### General HubSpot Cleanup

  - [Most ops reviewed by Bridget, with minor date adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Alice had previously worked on many of the ops](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Kyle to migrate everything over and conduct a final review](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Additional tasks: Set up reporting and address other checklist items](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create separate op for Ramp's completed 6-month project](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Adjust Ramp's current op to reflect ongoing 3-month renewals](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Determine best way to represent Airbyte's contract evolution in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Kyle to migrate all ops and generate renewals](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Conduct final review of all migrated ops](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Set up reporting and address remaining checklist items](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to address any remaining cleanup tasks for Ramp and Airbyte accounts](https://fathom.video/share/NXXrsA7TxXNC9v8cM-LdWy6tptpxZMD8?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
